title: Need to work out a system to repay loans - PM
body_lines: Three high-ranking officials of the Indian government will arrive in Sri Lanka tomorrow (June 23), Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe says.

Delivering a special statement in the parliament today (June 22), the prime minister said these Indian government officials are expected to hold talks pertaining to the loans offered to Sri Lanka in the future.
“We have sought more loans from India, but India cannot continue to lend us. We also need to work out a system to pay off loans,” PM Wickremesinghe added.
